title: Electric Stirring Coffee Mug,Self Stirring Coffee Mug, Self Mixing Mug 380ML Stainless Steel Automatic Stirring Mixer,Automatic Magnetic Stirring for Coffee, Milk, Cocoa and Other Beverages (Teal)
description:
About this item
High quality: This self stirring coffee cup is made of 316 stainless steel and premium ABS, with heat resistance and rust prevention functions. Anti slip silicone bottom and double-layer design provide reliable stability
Easy to clean: If you don't need the stirring function, our stainless steel coffee cup can be used as a regular water cup and is also easy to clean, just rinse with tap water. (Please note: Hand wash only, not dishwasher or microwave)
Exquisite craftsmanship: The electric mixing cup has a beautiful appearance, stylish design, finely polished cup mouth, comfortable handle, easy to carry, suitable for use in homes, hotels, offices, terraces, restaurants, cafes and other places.
Easy to operate: Press the button to start automatic mixing; Press stop again. It only takes a few seconds to fully mix and say goodbye to clumping problems. You don't need a spoon, you can also use the base for other flat bottomed cups
Fast Charging: The mixing cup does not require the installation of a battery and comes with a Type-C charging cable, which can be quickly charged anytime, anywhere, with long-lasting battery life and more convenient use
